classified.subject: Microsoft's Major Build, NVIDIA's Carry-On Cloud, and OpenAI's Plumbing Play
classified.author: Alex Banks
classified.rationale: Covers three directly wiki-relevant topics: (1) Microsoft Build AI announcements — Copilot, Azure AI, developer tools; (2) NVIDIA carry-on cloud — AI inference/training infrastructure; (3) OpenAI plumbing/API play — LLM infrastructure and platform strategy. All three map to core wiki entities (Microsoft, NVIDIA, OpenAI) and concepts (AI infrastructure, LLM APIs, cloud inference).
